name: 2pk Yalecrest Upholstered Seat and Back with Wood Frame Counter Height Barstools Cream/Natural - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Finish off your kitchen or bar setting with the 2-Pack Yalecrest Upholstered Seat and Back with Wood Frame Counter-Height Barstools from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. These two counter-height barstools stand on wooden legs at a fixed height and come with an upholstered seat and back for comfy sitting. Showcasing an armless design, these cream barstools make a functional and attractive addition to your space.

Overall Width: 18.5 inches
Overall Height: 38 inches
Overall Depth: 20 inches
Leg Height: 25 inches
Seat Depth: 15.75 inches
